title: Spring Rolls with Broccoli and Australian Fried Ingredients
description: A fusion twist on traditional spring rolls, incorporating Australian ingredients and a crispy fried twist. Perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Combine broccoli, spring onion and carrot in a bowl.
In a pan, heat vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add garlic powder, ginger powder and chilli flakes. Stir for 1 minute.
Add the broccoli mixture and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Add the rice paper rolls and fry until crispy (about 2-3 minutes per side).
Fill the cooked rice paper rolls with the broccoli mixture.
